subcodes.first_line: O ye two brothers, like unto twin bodies, who have endured grievous trials and mighty tribulations in the path of the Divine Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو برادر چون دو پیکر در سبیل جمال الهی مصائب و شدائد عظیم تحمل نمودید فسوف
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @business; financial; property matters, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort
